vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total failure. There is no evidence of living plant tissue in any of the pots. The environment appears to be a 'dead' setup.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of white, crystalline/calcified debris in P3 is the only non-soil element. The transition from clear, albeit empty, pots to a total visual blackout suggests a catastrophic failure in the monitoring environment.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The pots, while present, contain only soil and unidentified mineral debris. The sequence concludes with a loss of visual fidelity, rendering the current state of the biome unobservable.
